title: erythroxylum havanense
intro: Erythroxylum havanense, also known as Cuban Coca or Cuban Coca Bush, is a plant species native to Cuba and parts of the Caribbean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic. The health benefits of Erythroxylum havanense include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in the healing of wounds and skin conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
